descriptionShort: Florida Panthers roster statistics and game recap from March 1995 NHL action.
descriptionLong: This clipping from the South Florida Sun Sentinel (March 5, 1995) features Panthers player statistics and game notes from their contests. It includes a full roster box score with individual player stats and goaltender records, plus brief recaps of the Maple Leafs' 3-2 win over Calgary and the Canucks' 5-4 victory over Los Angeles. Notes highlight Dave Tomlinson's return to Cincinnati and Randy Moller's knee injury.
